business.name: Bhagwati Flowers
business.area: Matiala, Dwarka, Uttam Nagar & West Delhi

services.name: Varmala (Wedding Garlands)
services.description: Fresh flower varmalas crafted with roses, lotus, marigolds and seasonal flowers. Custom designs available to match your wedding palette.
services.price_note: Per pair, based on flowers chosen

services.name: Sangeet & Mehndi Decoration
services.description: Colorful, vibrant setups with floral arrangements, drapes, fairy lights, and themed props perfect for your pre-wedding celebrations.

services.name: Stage / Venue Decoration
services.description: Complete venue transformation — mandap, stage, entrance arches, centerpieces, and full floral décor for your main wedding ceremony.
services.price_note: Based on venue size & decoration level

services.name: Car Decoration
services.description: Beautiful car decoration for baraat & wedding. Fresh flowers, ribbons, and themed ornaments — your grand entrance deserves the best.
services.price_note: Per car, based on design complexity

services.name: Flower Jewellery
services.description: Stunning floral jewellery sets for the bride — necklace, bangles, maang tikka, and more. A beautiful alternative to gold for functions.
services.price_note: Full set pricing; individual pieces also available

services.name: Gajre (Flower Hair Accessories)
services.description: Traditional gajre for bride, bridesmaids, and family. Made fresh on your wedding day with mogra, roses, and other fragrant flowers.
services.price_note: Per piece, depending on size & flowers
